questions.question: What is the time complexity of the Brute Force string matching algorithm, where a string of length 'n' is compared to every substring of length 'n' in the database of strings?
questions.hint: The time complexity of Brute Force algorithm is O(n^2), where n is the length of the string

questions.question: Write a step-by-step process for implementing the sequential search algorithm to find a specific pattern in a database of strings.
questions.hint: The sequential search algorithm compares the pattern to each string in the database one by one until it finds a match.

questions.question: What is the main difference between the Brute Force and Sequential Search algorithms in the context of string matching?
questions.hint: The main difference is that the Brute Force algorithm compares every possible substring of the target string to every string in the database, while the Sequential Search algorithm compares the target string to each string in the database one by one.
